title: P1-A — Make the workspace close (X) button functional + keyboard-reachable
change: In the workspaces.map((w) => (...)) body (currently lines 66-89), convert the arrow to a block body and add two per-row consts: `const isActive = w.id === activeWorkspaceId` and `const canClose = !isActive && workspaces.length > 1`. (1) On <SelectItem> (line 67) add (these pass through the shadcn wrapper's {...props} spread onto SelectPrimitive.Item, composing BEFORE Radix's internal onKeyDown via composeEventHandlers): `aria-keyshortcuts={canClose ? 'Delete' : undefined}` and an `onKeyDown` handler that, when canClose, calls `e.preventDefault()` + `void closeWorkspace(w.id)` for key === 'Delete' || 'Backspace' (else undefined). Delete/Backspace are neither Radix SELECTION_KEYS nor single-char typeahead, so preventDefault cleanly suppresses Radix's handler. (2) On the close <button> (lines 72-85) ADD `onPointerUp={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}` — this is the entire mouse bug: Radix Select.Item commits selection on pointer-UP for mouse pointers, which today bubbles and switches the workspace before the button's onClick DELETE fires. Keep the existing onPointerDown stop, the onClick (preventDefault+stopPropagation+closeWorkspace), `disabled={workspaces.length === 1}`, aria-label and classNames unchanged. Do NOT add onMouseUp (Radix Select is pointer-events only). Render the button via the new const: `{!isActive && (`. Leave the OPEN_SENTINEL item untouched. Do NOT touch src/components/ui/select.tsx, src/store/useStore.ts, or the server DELETE route (all already correct).
acceptance: Mouse-clicking the X on a non-active workspace fires exactly one DELETE /api/workspaces/:id, removes that row, leaves activeWorkspaceId unchanged (no switch), and keeps the dropdown open. With the dropdown open, arrow-focusing a non-active option and pressing Delete (or Backspace) closes it identically; the option exposes aria-keyshortcuts="Delete". The active row and the last remaining workspace never expose a close affordance. `npm run typecheck` and `npm run lint` pass.

title: P1-B — Persist added workspaces (per-default-root) + restore on boot + reconnect reconcile
change: Implement plan sections P1-B changes 1-4, 6, 7 (change 5, package.json watcher, is owned by WU-S). (1) runtime/paths.ts: after USER_PROMPTS_DIR (line 56) export `USER_WORKSPACES_FILE = path.join(HOME, '.agentprism', 'workspaces.json')`. (2) NEW runtime/workspace-store.ts: host-side persistence keyed by canonical default root — export `canonicalKey(p)` (fs.realpathSync.native(resolve) with resolve fallback), `loadPersistedRoots(defaultRoot)` (reads byDefaultRoot[key]; filters to absolute existing directories; tolerates missing/corrupt/legacy -> []), `savePersistedRoots(defaultRoot, roots)` (read-modify-write touching ONLY this key; empty list deletes the key; mkdir -p + temp+rename; best-effort try/catch swallow). Shape `{ version: 2, byDefaultRoot: Record<string,string[]> }`. (3) runtime/workspace-registry.ts: extend opts to `{ env?; onChange?: (allOpenRoots: string[]) => void }`; add `fireChange = () => opts.onChange?.([...map.values()].map((ws) => ws.root))` reporting ALL open roots (NOT filtered by defaultId); call it in open() only after a real map.set (not the early `if (existing) return`), and in close() after map.delete. (4) runtime/index.ts: add `persistWorkspaces?: boolean` to RuntimeOptions (default false); replace the construction block (lines 42-54) with the restoring-guarded sequence from the plan — `persistEnabled = options.persistWorkspaces === true`, a `restoring` flag, a FIXED `defaultRoot` captured AFTER the first open and NEVER reassigned, `persistNonDefault(allOpenRoots)` that saves `allOpenRoots.filter((r) => canonicalKey(r) !== canonicalKey(defaultRoot))`, wire onChange ONLY when persistEnabled (else pass undefined -> registry stays fs-inert), open provided roots or the cwd default, set defaultRoot, then if persistEnabled restore loadPersistedRoots(defaultRoot) (each registry.open in try/catch), set restoring=false, and do one authoritative persistNonDefault(registry.list().map((w) => w.root)). Import loadPersistedRoots/savePersistedRoots/canonicalKey from ./workspace-store.ts. runWorkflow stays unchanged (never sets persistWorkspaces). (6) server/index.ts:10 -> `createRuntime({ persistWorkspaces: true })`; bin/agentprism-ide.mjs:89 -> `createRuntime({ workspaces: [root, ...extraRoots], persistWorkspaces: true })`. (7) src/store/useStore.ts hello case (~lines 962-986): after computing validation, compute `activeStillValid = msg.workspaces.some((w) => w.id === s.activeWorkspaceId)`; the existing set({...}) leaves activeWorkspaceId unchanged; then `if (!activeStillValid && msg.defaultWorkspaceId) void get().setActiveWorkspace(msg.defaultWorkspaceId)` so a pruned/gone active ws repoints to default and refetches. Do NOT touch closeWorkspace() or any other store method.
acceptance: Adding an extra workspace via the IDE writes its absolute root under byDefaultRoot["<canonical default root>"] in ~/.agentprism/workspaces.json; a server restart (same cwd) restores it (GET /api/workspaces lists it, scoped routes 200, no 404). Closing it removes its key when the list empties (other projects' keys untouched). A persisted root deleted off-disk is auto-pruned on restart with no crash and, if it was active, the picker repoints to default after the WS reconnect (no dangling id / 404 storm). The shipped `npx agentprism-ide` binary persists+restores (not just dev:server). A ws added in /projA does not appear when launched in /projC. Close-the-default survival: with boot default /projA + added /projB, switching active to /projB then closing /projA, a relaunch in /projA still restores /projB. runWorkflow / createRuntime({workspaces}) without persistWorkspaces leaves workspaces.json mtime unchanged. `npm run typecheck` and `npm run lint` pass.

title: P1-C — Replace project-tree shim with bare specifier `agentprism/capability` (node_modules shim + self-ref + disk-resolved dts + Monaco virtual pkg)
change: Implement plan sections P1-C changes 2,3,4,5,6,7 (change 1, the package.json exports["./capability"] subpath, is owned by WU-S). (2) runtime/workspace.ts: replace the ensureCapabilityShimAt/ensureCapabilityShim/ensureUserCapabilityShim block (lines 158-208) with a node_modules-package generator. Add `const SHIM_MARKER = '_agentprismShim'`. `ensureAgentprismPackageShim(root)`: return if canonicalizeRoot(root) === canonicalizeRoot(PACKAGE_ROOT); else target `<root>/node_modules/agentprism/{package.json,capability.ts}`; if package.json exists and parsed._agentprismShim !== true (or parse fails) return (foreign/real install left intact); otherwise (re)write idempotently with mkdir + both writeFileSync wrapped in a best-effort try/catch (REQUIRED — a RO/full/permission-denied root must NOT fail the open; degrade to per-module loadError; this also keeps P1-B from pruning the root on a transient write failure). package.json = `{ name:'agentprism', version:'0.0.0-agentprism-shim', type:'module', exports:{ './capability': './capability.ts' }, _agentprismShim:true }`; capability.ts = sentinel comment + `export * from <JSON.stringify(rel)>` where rel = forward-slashed `./`-prefixed relative(pkgDir, PACKAGE_ROOT/shared/capability.ts). `ensureUserAgentprismShim()`: same generator (same try/catch) targeting path.dirname(USER_TOOLS_DIR) (~/.agentprism), gated on the existing `readdirSync(USER_TOOLS_DIR).some(/\.(ts|mts|js|mjs)$/)` check. Update call sites (lines 238-239) to the new fn names; update the explanatory comments; do NOT delete any pre-existing <root>/shared/capability.ts (now inert). Drop the now-dead `packageRoot: PACKAGE_ROOT` arg in loadCapabilities call (line 265). (3) runtime/engine/derive-capability-dts.ts: change INJECT_SRC (line 57) import to `from 'agentprism/capability'`; DELETE the capSrc read + the two shared/capability.ts overlay lines (164-171) entirely (NO replacement overlay — the bare specifier resolves off REAL disk via the pre-written node_modules shim / PACKAGE_ROOT self-ref, guaranteed present because createWorkspace writes shims before any derive runs); overlays map keeps ONLY [injectPath, INJECT_SRC] and [checkPath, buildCheckSrc(files)]; remove the unused `import fs` (line 10); remove `packageRoot` + `userToolsParent` from DeriveDtsOptions (lines 22-29) and from the destructure (line 143, -> `const { workspaceRoot } = opts`); update the interface doc comment. Do NOT add a virtual node_modules overlay (proven to fail — ts.createCompilerHost directoryExists/realpath hit real disk). (4) runtime/engine/capability-loader.ts: call `deriveCapabilityDts(scanned.map((f) => ({ path: f.path, modifiedAt: f.modifiedAt })), { workspaceRoot: o.workspaceRoot })`; remove `LoadCapabilitiesOptions.packageRoot` (line 49); drop now-unused `path` / `USER_TOOLS_DIR` imports (let lint confirm). (5) tools/git.ts, tools/gitlab.ts, tools/jira.ts: change line 2 import from '../shared/capability.ts' to 'agentprism/capability' (bodies unchanged). mr-prompt.ts has NO such import — leave it. Do NOT touch ../shared/capability.ts imports anywhere under runtime/**, shared/**, server/**, src/** (correct package-internal). (6) src/lib/monaco-setup.ts: remove capabilityLibPath (lines 17-22); rewrite baseToolLibs (lines 156-161) to return a virtual `file:///<wsId>/node_modules/agentprism/package.json` (exports './capability' -> './capability.ts'), `file:///<wsId>/node_modules/agentprism/capability.ts` (content = unchanged capabilitySource), and the NODE_SHIM lib; update the header comment. (7) src/features/editor/WorkflowEditor.tsx:176 — comment only: reference agentprism/capability (no logic change). (8) .claude/skills/agentprism-authoring/tools.md:16 — change the canonical import to 'agentprism/capability' and document the plain default-export fallback (`export default { name, secrets, effects }` — no import needed).
acceptance: Default workspace GET /api/workspaces/:id/capabilities lists git/gitlab/jira with methods, NO loadError, non-empty dts (PACKAGE_ROOT self-ref), and no <root>/shared/capability.ts is created in the repo. A fresh external workspace whose tools/foo.ts imports 'agentprism/capability' loads with methods, no loadError, non-empty dts, and a node_modules/agentprism/{package.json (with _agentprismShim:true),capability.ts} shim under that root (nothing written into its source tree); a sibling tools/bar.ts using a plain default export also loads. A node_modules/agentprism/package.json lacking the sentinel is left as-is. A read-only external root still opens (HTTP 200) with its bare-specifier tools surfacing a per-module loadError (not a 500), and stays in workspaces.json. Monaco shows no 2307 marker on the agentprism/capability import and types defineCapability/Capability. `npm run typecheck` and `npm run lint` pass.

title: Shared package.json — add exports["./capability"] (P1-C) + scope the dev:server watcher (P1-B)
change: Two non-overlapping JSON-key edits, single owner so no merge conflict. (P1-C) Add to `exports` (after "./server"): `"./capability": "./shared/capability.ts"` — shared/ is already in `files`, so the source ships; this is the subpath the monorepo self-ref and the external node_modules shim both target (WU-C). (P1-B) Change `scripts.dev:server` from `tsx watch server/index.ts` to `tsx watch --exclude "**/.agentprism/**" --exclude "**/node_modules/**" server/index.ts` so editing user-tier tool files under ~/.agentprism/tools/** (which the capability loader import()s) no longer restarts the dev server, and the workspaces.json write under ~/.agentprism/ cannot retrigger the watcher. Touch no other keys.
acceptance: `agentprism/capability` resolves to shared/capability.ts via the package's own exports (self-reference) in the monorepo with no shim written for the default/package-root workspace. Editing a file under ~/.agentprism/tools/** does NOT restart `npm run dev:server`. Must land before WU-B and WU-C run their runtime/empirical verification. `npm run typecheck` and `npm run lint` pass.
